title: Uniform rectifiability of brittle fractures in linear elasticity
summary: We prove the uniform rectifiability of brittle fractures in arbitrary dimension. The existing approach for the Mumford-Shah functional, which relies on separation-type properties of the singular set, faces serious obstacles in the Griffith setting due to the lack of coarea formula for the symmetric gradient. We present an alternative route to uniform rectifiability for free-discontinuity problems by proving that cracks have ``plenty of big projections''.

AI.tldr: 证明了任意维数下脆性断裂的一致可整流性，克服了Griffith断裂理论中对称梯度缺乏余面积公式的困难
AI.motivation: 研究脆性断裂的一致可整流性问题，传统Mumford-Shah泛函方法依赖于奇异集的分离性质，但在Griffith断裂理论中由于对称梯度缺乏余面积公式而面临严重障碍
AI.techniques: 提出了"大量大投影"方法，通过证明裂纹具有充分的大投影性质来建立一致可整流性，避免了传统分离性质方法的困难
AI.main_theorems: 证明了任意维数下脆性断裂的一致可整流性，为自由不连续问题提供了新的分析途径
AI.significance: 为Griffith断裂理论中的自由不连续问题提供了新的分析框架，克服了传统方法的局限性，对断裂力学和变分分析有重要理论意义

title: Global Existence for Reaction-diffusion Equations with State-Dependent Delay and Fast-growing Nonlinearities
summary: This work aims to study the initial-boundary value problem of the reaction-diffusion equation with state-dependent delay $\pa_{t}u-Δu=f(u)+g(u,u(t-τ(t,u_t)))+h(t,x)$ in a bounded domain. We establish the global existence of the problem under suitable dissipative-type structural conditions, allowing both nonlinear terms $f$ and $g$ to have arbitrary polynomial growth rates. Another highlight in this work is that, we significantly relax the continuity assumptions imposed on the delay functions.

AI.tldr: 建立了具有状态依赖时滞的反应扩散方程初边值问题的全局存在性，放宽了时滞函数的连续性要求
AI.motivation: 研究具有状态依赖时滞的反应扩散方程初边值问题，这类方程在生物学、化学和物理学中有广泛应用，但状态依赖时滞增加了分析难度
AI.techniques: 使用耗散型结构条件、能量估计方法、不动点理论，以及处理状态依赖时滞的特殊技巧
AI.main_theorems: 在适当耗散条件下建立了全局解的存在性，允许非线性项f和g具有任意多项式增长率，并显著放宽了对时滞函数的连续性要求
AI.significance: 扩展了时滞反应扩散方程的理论框架，为更一般的状态依赖时滞系统提供了分析工具，在生物种群动力学、化学反应等应用中有重要价值

title: The singularity at degenerate points in steady axisymmetric compressible free surface flows with gravity
summary:
In this paper, we analyze the singular shape of the free boundary at degenerate points in a three dimensional axisymmetric compressible gravity flow. For all possible degenerate points on the free surface, we prove that the only nontrivial asymptotic behavior of the free surface at the stagnation points away from the axis of symmetry is the Stokes corner flow. The possible geometries for free boundaries at the non-stagnation axis points are downward pointing or upward pointing cusps. At the origin, there are only two nontrivial asymptotics possible: the Garabedian's pointed bubble or a horizontal flat surface.
  The problem is associated with the analysis of the degenerate points of a quasilinear free boundary problem of the Bernoulli type, and the main obstacles are the absence of a Weiss-type monotonicity formula. To achieve our goal, we establish for the first time monotonicity formulas for quasilinear Bernoulli type free boundary problems. Our formula works both when the equation becomes singular and when the free boundary condition is degenerate.
  Moreover, we establish a new nonlinear frequency formula at the horizontal flat points at the origin and integrate it with the compensated compactness theory for Euler equations, ensuring the strong convergence of variational solutions.
  Our results resolve the Stokes conjecture [Mathematical and Physical Papers, Vol. I., 1880] in a generalized compressible, three dimensional axisymmetric framework. In addition, it can also be realized as a compressible counterpart to Vǎrvǎrucǎ and Weiss [Comm. Pure Appl. Math., (67), 2014]. Our approach is completely new and gives a systematic approach for studying singularities of a singular Bernoulli type quasilinear free boundary problem.

AI.tldr: 在三维轴对称可压缩重力流中，首次建立了拟线性伯努利型自由边界问题的单调性公式，解决了斯托克斯猜想在可压缩轴对称框架下的推广问题。
AI.motivation: 研究三维轴对称可压缩重力流中自由边界在退化点处的奇异性状，特别是解决斯托克斯猜想在可压缩、轴对称框架下的推广问题。核心数学问题是分析拟线性伯努利型自由边界问题的退化点。
AI.techniques: 首次建立了拟线性伯努利型自由边界问题的单调性公式（克服了Weiss型单调性公式缺失的障碍）；建立了原点处水平平坦点的新非线性频率公式；结合欧拉方程的补偿紧致性理论。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 远离对称轴的驻点处，自由表面的唯一非平凡渐近行为是斯托克斯角流；2. 非驻点轴点处，自由边界只能是向下或向上的尖点；3. 原点处只有两种非平凡渐近：Garabedian的尖泡或水平平坦表面。
AI.significance: 解决了斯托克斯猜想在可压缩三维轴对称框架下的推广，建立了研究奇异伯努利型拟线性自由边界问题奇异性的系统方法，为Vǎrvǎrucǎ和Weiss（2014）的工作提供了可压缩对应版本。

title: Solutions with one dimensional concentration for a two dimensional Gross-Pitaevskii model with general potential
summary: We concern standing wave solutions with frequency $λ$ to a two dimensional Gross-Pitaevskii equation with a trap potential under the unit mass constraint, which is used to describe Bose-Einstein condensates with attractive interaction. First, we investigate the necessary conditions for existence of the solutions with concentration phenomena directed along closed smooth curves. Next, not only imposing stationary and non-degeneracy conditions on the curves with respect to an auxiliary weighted length involving the trap potential, but also adding some other technical assumptions, we select a sequence $\{λ_j\}$ of the frequency $λ$ with $-λ_j\rightarrow +\infty$ and construct solutions with concentration directed along the curves. Our result partially answers the conjecture raised in [A. Ambrosetti, A. Malchiodi, W.-M. Ni, Comm. Math. Phys. 2003] about necessary condition for solution concentrating at submanifolds. The solutions constructed in this paper are concentrating on curves whose length are non-uniformly bounded, and hence the situation is quite different from that in [M. del Pino, M. Kowalczyk, J. Wei, Comm. Pure Appl. Math. 2007].

AI.tldr: 研究了二维Gross-Pitaevskii方程在质量约束下沿闭曲线集中的驻波解的存在性和构造
AI.motivation: 研究具有吸引相互作用的玻色-爱因斯坦凝聚体中的Gross-Pitaevskii方程，探讨在质量约束下驻波解沿闭曲线集中的现象，部分回答Ambrosetti等人关于解沿子流形集中的必要条件的猜想
AI.techniques: 使用变分方法、集中现象分析、辅助加权长度函数、频率序列选择技术，以及曲线上的平稳性和非退化性条件
AI.main_theorems: 建立了沿闭曲线集中的解存在的必要条件，并在曲线满足平稳性、非退化性及技术假设下，构造了频率趋于负无穷时沿给定曲线集中的解序列
AI.significance: 部分解决了Ambrosetti等人关于解沿子流形集中必要条件的猜想，处理了长度无界集中的新情况，与del Pino等人的有界长度结果形成对比，对理解非线性薛定谔方程中的集中现象有重要意义

title: Analytical solutions for long cylindrical shells under radial deformations based on the isotropic relaxed micromorphic continuum
summary: This study presents a closed-form analytical solution for the elastostatic response of long cylindrical shells composed of microstructured materials within the framework of the isotropic relaxed micromorphic continuum. The formulation accounts for microstructural effects by introducing an independent micro-distortion tensor field in addition to the classical displacement field. Under the assumptions of axisymmetric deformation and plane strain conditions, the governing equilibrium equations reduce to a coupled system of ordinary differential equations in the radial coordinate. By introducing suitable auxiliary variables, the system is reformulated into a non-homogeneous modified Bessel equation, which admits an exact analytical solution. Explicit expressions are derived for the radial displacement field and the non-zero components of the micro-distortion tensor. Numerical examples are presented to illustrate the influence of material parameters and the characteristic length on the displacement. The results demonstrate that the relaxed micromorphic model predicts deviations from classical elasticity where microstructural effects are more pronounced. The obtained solution provides valuable physical insight into the mechanics of cylindrical shells and serves as a benchmark for validating numerical implementations of relaxed micromorphic models.

AI.tldr: 提出了微结构材料长圆柱壳弹性静力响应的闭式解析解，基于各向同性松弛微形态连续介质理论。
AI.motivation: 研究微结构材料圆柱壳的力学响应，传统连续介质力学无法充分描述微结构效应，需要发展包含微结构信息的连续介质理论。
AI.techniques: 采用松弛微形态连续介质理论，引入独立微畸变张量场；利用轴对称变形和平面应变假设将控制方程简化为常微分方程组；通过辅助变量变换将系统重构为非齐次修正贝塞尔方程；获得精确解析解。
AI.main_theorems: 推导出径向位移场和非零微畸变张量分量的显式表达式；建立了微结构材料圆柱壳弹性静力响应的闭式解析解；通过数值算例展示了材料参数和特征长度对位移的影响。
AI.significance: 为微结构材料圆柱壳力学提供了物理洞察；验证了松弛微形态模型在微结构效应显著区域与经典弹性理论的偏差；为数值实现提供了基准解；推动了微结构连续介质理论在工程结构分析中的应用。

title: On the singular nature of shallow-water convergence of the intermediate long wave equation on the real line
summary: We investigate regularity properties of the solution map for the intermediate long wave equation (ILW) on the real line. More precisely, we study the scaled ILW which was shown to converge to the Korteweg-de Vries equation (KdV) in $L^2(\mathbb R)$ in the shallow-water limit in a recent work by the first, third, and fourth authors with T. Zhao (2025). By decomposing the dynamics into the low frequency part and the residual part, we show that, when the depth parameter is sufficiently small, the solution map for the low frequency part is analytic in $L^2(\mathbb R)$, while the solution map for the residual part fails to be $C^2$. Moreover, we establish shallow-water convergence in $L^2(\mathbb R)$ of the low frequency dynamics to KdV. This explains the mechanism of the regularity gain of the solution map in the shallow-water limit.

AI.tldr: 证明了中间长波方程解映射在浅水极限下的正则性增益机制：低频部分在L^2中解析，而剩余部分甚至不是C^2的。
AI.motivation: 研究中间长波方程（ILW）解映射的正则性性质，特别关注其在浅水极限下如何收敛到KdV方程，并解释解映射正则性增益的机制。
AI.techniques: 将动力学分解为低频部分和剩余部分，分析各自解映射的正则性；利用浅水极限下的收敛性分析；采用解析函数理论和正则性理论。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 当深度参数足够小时，低频部分的解映射在L^2(R)中是解析的；2. 剩余部分的解映射甚至不是C^2的；3. 低频动力学在L^2(R)中浅水收敛到KdV方程。
AI.significance: 揭示了ILW方程解映射在浅水极限下正则性增益的数学机制，为理解水波方程的正则性行为提供了新视角，连接了ILW和KdV方程的理论框架。
